creator: marc.vanwoerkom@science-factory.com
text:
send-pr offers category "update", but this is rejected:

          You can access the state of your problem report at any time
          via this link:

          http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=23324

	  Note: There was a bad value `update' for the field `>Class:'.
	  It was set to the default value of `sw-bug'.

        Hmm? :)

Fix: 

please inform send-pr/gnats system maintainer

Regards,
Marc
How-To-Repeat:         use send-pr with category update
